About Us

Who We Are

Ana Holding is a private commodity trading company headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, and part of the Ana Wealth group. We specialise in sourcing, certifying, and facilitating the movement of high-purity metals across international markets.

Swiss Headquarters

Based in Zug with a global network of suppliers, brokers, and end-buyers across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

Certified Supply

All products backed by independent lab certifications, assay reports, and third-party verification from GIREDMET, ISE, and IGAS.

Flexible Partnerships

Commission-based introducer agreements, bespoke supply arrangements, and transparent pricing tailored to each partner.

Active Supply Agreements

Long-term contracts with verified suppliers, ensuring consistent availability and competitive pricing for our trading partners.

Leadership

Management Team

Ariel

Director

Over 20 years of experience in private finance, wealth management, and family office advisory. Deep expertise in structuring private transactions, managing complex portfolios, and building trusted relationships with institutional and private partners across Europe and the Middle East.

Patrick

Head of Trading

Over 20 years of independent trading experience with an extensive track record in precious and base metals. Oversees all trading operations, supply chain logistics, and partner negotiations. Hands-on market knowledge ensures competitive pricing and reliable execution.

Product Catalogue

Our Offering

Click any product to expand full specifications, certifications, and imagery.

Ultra-Fine Copper Powder

99.99999% Purity ▼

Ultra-fine copper powder with exceptional purity, independently certified by the Institute for Rare Earth Elements and Metals (ISE) in Lucerne, Switzerland.

Key Facts

  • Purity: 99.99999% (based on metallic impurities)
  • Particle size: ~1.4 µm, roundish form (>95%)
  • Analysis: GD-MS per ISO/TS 15338:2009
  • Supply: bulk quantities with active agreements

Typical Applications

  • Electronics — conductive pastes, PCBs, EMI shielding
  • Additive manufacturing and 3D metal printing
  • Chemical catalysts and powder metallurgy
  • Trading desks seeking certified bulk supply
SEM analysis — particle structure at high magnification

Copper Ingots

6N — 99.9999% ▼

Ultra-high purity copper ingots (6N grade) with full independent certification. Available in 1 kg bars, stored and inspectable at Jebel Ali Free Zone, Dubai.

Key Facts

  • Purity: 99.9999% (impurities ≤ 0.0001%wt)
  • Format: 1 kg ingots, lots of 1,200 kg
  • 50 containers × 24 kg, 24 ingots each
  • Certification: GIREDMET, ICP-MASS, radiological safety
  • Supply: 12-month contracts, 100 MT/month, FOB Dubai
  • Inspection: SGS / Intertek / Bureau Veritas

Typical Applications

  • Feedstock for copper smelters and refineries
  • Wire rod and cable manufacturing
  • Trading houses and commodity brokers
1 kg copper ingot with GIREDMET certification
Certificate of Chemical Contents #3672-25

Aluminum Ingots

Grade A-7 (Al99.7) ▼

Grade A-7 aluminum ingots (Al99.7) with full chemical composition documentation. Standard industrial-grade product for foundries, manufacturers, and commodity trading.

Key Facts

  • Grade: A-7 (Al99.7) — aluminum content ≥ 99.70%
  • Total impurities ≤ 0.30% (Si, Fe, Cu, Ga, Mg, Zn, Mn)
  • Standard ingot form, available in bulk quantities
  • Full chemical composition certificate with every shipment

Typical Applications

  • Foundries and die-casting for automotive and aerospace
  • Construction and infrastructure projects
  • Packaging — foil, cans, and food-grade containers
  • Commodity trading partners sourcing in bulk
Grade A-7 aluminum ingots — standard industrial form
Warehouse stock — palletised for bulk shipment

Nickel Wire

NP1 DKRNT 0.025mm ▼

High-purity nickel wire (NP1 DKRNT, 0.025 mm diameter) certified by IGAS Research, Germany. Available in two purity grades with DDP delivery to Europe.

Key Facts

  • Two grades: 99.86% and 99.97% purity (IGAS certified)
  • Diameter: 0.025 mm (1 gram = 227 linear metres)
  • Spool bobbins: 150–180 g each, in professional cases
  • Lot sizes: 50 kg, 100 kg, or 300 kg
  • DDP delivery (Italy and other European destinations)
  • Non-radioactive, Certificate of Origin Europe

Typical Applications

  • Battery production for EVs and energy storage
  • Electronics — heating elements, resistance wire, sensors
  • Aerospace, marine, and precision manufacturing
NP1 DKRNT spool bobbins in professional transport case
Complete delivery case — ready for transport
How We Work

Transaction Process

A clear, structured path from first inquiry to delivered goods — with independent verification at every stage.

1
Inquiry & NDA
Initial discussion, product selection, confidentiality agreement
2
Soft Corporate Offer
Detailed SCO with pricing, specifications, and terms
3
SPA Execution
Sale & Purchase Agreement signed by both parties
4
Independent Inspection
SGS, Intertek, or Bureau Veritas verification
5
Payment & Transfer
Warehouse documents transferred, goods released
6
Delivery
Secure transport to buyer's destination
Beyond Our Catalogue

Custom Sourcing Requests

Looking for a specific metal, grade, or quantity that isn't listed above? We can help.

We Source For You

Tell us what you need — metal type, purity, volume, delivery terms — and we'll tap into our extensive network of verified suppliers to find the right match. No obligation, no upfront cost.

We Collect Offers

We actively collect competitive offers from our network on your behalf — multiple quotes, different origins, varied delivery terms — so you can compare and choose the best fit for your requirements.

Precious metals  ·  Rare earths  ·  Industrial metals  ·  Specialty alloys  ·  If it trades, we can source it.
